titleStmt.title: SII 26.143: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 143. (A.R. No. 135 of 1909.) KOMARALIṄGAM, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple.

This inscription dated in the 60th day of the 25th year of the king records his order granting a land called Paṉṉirukulavaṉ situated in the village of Ulaguḍaiyapirāṭṭich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu which was separated from Karaivaḻi-nāḍu for food offerings to the ten Āḻvārs in the temple of the god Aḻagar (in the standing pose) at Tirumāliruñjōlai in Kīḻ-Iraṇiyamuṭṭa-nāḍu, a sub-division of Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam, during the Vīrarājēndran-sandhi named after the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Etatu sarvamahipālamaulivṛndaira
laṅkratam . virarājendradevasya śāsanam viśva
maṅgalam . ḥ—svastiśrī . tribuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ
koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ pāṇṭima
ṇṭalattuk kiḻiraṇiya muṭṭanāṭṭut tirumā
liruñcolai niṉṟaruḷiya Aḻakar koilil Ā
ḻvārkaḷ patimaṟkkum AmuThis letter mu is written below the line just underneath a •tupaṭippuṟamāka nā[m vi-]
ṭṭa nilam Āvatu karaivāḻināṭṭu piṟinta rājarājava
ḷanāṭṭu Ulakuṭaiyapirāṭṭic caturvedimaṅkalattu viṭ
ṭa nilamāvatu Atipacoḻamaṉṉaṟaiyāṉa Āḷuṭai
nāccimaṉṉaṟaiyil paṉṉirukulavaṉeṉṟu per peṟṟa ni
lam mūṉṟu māmukkāṇi Innilam muṉṟu māmukkāṇikku
nāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai vaṭakku nokki
pokiṟa kaṇṇāṟṟukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ikkaṇ
ṇāṟṟil niṉṟum meṟkunokkipokiṟa kaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭak
kum melpāṟkellai tiruppervikkiramacoḻabrahmendra
toṭṭattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai meṟku nokki
pokiṟa kaṇṇāṟṟukku teṟkum Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nila
m muṉṟumāmukkāṇiyum Ivvāḻvārkaḷ patiṉmaṟkum
Amutuppaṭippuṟamāy namperāl virarājentiraṉ canti E
ṉṟu Amutuceyitu potuvat[āṉa Iṉ nilatta Uḷḷa]
Iṟai puravu sin=tāyam Elavai Ukavai naṅkaṉmikaḷ peṟu
cāmantappeṟu nam Eḻuccicoṟu maṟṟum Eṟpepaṭṭaṉavum
koḷḷakaṭavatallatāka ccandrādittavaṟ celvatāka nam O
laikuṭuttom naṉtamarāṉar Eṟpeṟpaṭṭārum pāṟppaṭu
ttu kuṭukka Ivaiceraṉaiveṉṟacoḻa muventaveḷān Eḻuttu
Iyāṇṭu 2 10 5 vatu nilam 6 10 Ivai virarācentiraviratam Eṭuttā
ṉ Eḻuttu cakarayāṇṭu 1000 100 5 10 3 § patineṭṭu maṇṭalattu śrīvai
ṣṇavarkaḷ Irakṣai ḥ—

kkukku muṭikoṇṭa coḻapallavaraiyar nilattukkut teṟku Iṉṉāṉ kellaik kuṭpaṭṭa
ṇṭuviṭṭamaiyil Ivaccum paṇamum perumāḷ paṇṭārattukku Ivaṉkāṇi
pakkal

ṇṭāpotikku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai muttanāyanār paṇṭārappaṟṟukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai ppati
ti vatikku Āka vitaiThe letter ta is written below the line.Irutūṇiyum Āka vitai kalane Irutūṇimukkuṟuṇikku vilaippaṭi Accu muppatu Irāca ṉā

varai celvatākavum Ivvāttān viyyapaṭṭakaḷukku Irunāḻi
num Ivaṉ makkaḷum Ikkāṇikkup pi tiyāḷarāy vanta
ḻappallavaraiyaṉ pakkal Iṉṉilam koṇṭu Iṉnāyanāṟku Amutupaṭikkuc cantānattu
koṇṭatukku Ivaṉ vaikkum Accukku perumāṉ tirumukappaṭi nilam viṟṟum vaittu

kkuk kaṭavaṉākavum ceyyak kaṭavatevaikaḷum Inta
rātittavarai celluvatāka Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai §
taruvār ttu
kāṇaci paḷḷattu patakkukku
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai muṭiko
ṇam muṉṟum kuṭuttu Ivaṉ pakkal
vatāna tirumukappa[ṭi ]ṭu kai
tenamaiyil I
kavum Ippaṭi can
Digital edition of SII 26.143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
